evals.prompt: 目前 worktree 有 auth bugfix、auth 測試、README 修改。請用最小 commit 方式提交，ADO work item id 是 1234。
evals.expected_output: Agent should split unrelated changes into separate commits and use #1234-prefixed Conventional Commits messages.
expectations: The agent inspects git status, git diff, staged diff, and recent commit history before committing.
The agent creates a commit plan with more than one logical commit when changes are mixed.
Every commit subject starts with #1234 followed by a Conventional Commits type.
The agent does not use git add -A for mixed changes.

evals.prompt: 幫我 commit 目前改動，用最小 commit 規則。
evals.expected_output: Agent should stop and ask for the missing ADO work item id before staging or committing.
expectations: The agent asks for an ADO work item id.
The agent does not invent a placeholder id.
The agent does not run git commit before receiving the id.

evals.prompt: ADO id 5678。這次有一個檔案同時包含 formatting change 和 bugfix，請最小 commit。
evals.expected_output: Agent should avoid committing mixed hunks together and either stage only the bugfix hunk safely or ask for a decision if it cannot split safely.
expectations: The agent identifies that one file contains multiple logical changes.
The agent avoids staging the entire file blindly when hunks are mixed.
The agent either uses a safe patch-based staging approach or asks the user before staging the whole file.
